title: galium mollugo var. alpinum
intro: Galium mollugo var. alpinum, also known as alpine bedstraw, is a perennial herb belonging to the Rubiaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its diuretic, antispasmodic, and anti-inflammatory effects. It is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and alleviating menstrual cramps. Galium mollugo var. alpinum can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
